'''Rrr'ur'R''' was the nickname of the Tusken Raider warrior [[URoRRuR'R'R]]'s [[Bantha/Legends|bantha]]. He was the alpha male of his herd<ref name="CCG">{{CCG|set=Special Edition Limited|cardname=URoRRuR'R'R's Bantha}}</ref>, and raised by [[RR'uruurrr]]<ref name="CCG" />, bantha tender of the tribe<ref name="RR'uruurrr">{{CCG|set=Special Edition Limited|cardname=RR'uruurrr}}</ref>. Rrr'ur'R has trampled many [[Jawa/Legends|Jawas]] while being ridden by URoRRuR'R'R<ref name="CCG" />.
